title: Refined Storage - REI Integration
description: Refined Storage has an optional integration mod for Roughly Enough Items (REI), enhancing crafting and recipe interaction.
body:
Refined Storage has an optional integration mod for Roughly Enough Items (REI), enhancing crafting and recipe interaction.

## Recipe transferring in the Crafting Grid

You can transfer recipes from REI directly into the [Crafting Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/crafting-grid.html).

- Missing ingredients? The transfer will still place what you have.  
- If autocrafting is available for missing ingredients, you can start autocrafting tasks from the preview.

![REI crafting grid transfer](https://refinedmods.com/rei-crafting-grid-transfer.75aff855.png)  
![REI crafting grid transfer preview](https://refinedmods.com/rei-crafting-grid-transfer-preview.bf8a7ff4.png)

## Recipe transferring in the Pattern Grid

Recipes from REI can also be transferred into the [Pattern Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/autocrafting/pattern-grid.html). The interface will show which ingredients are autocraftable.

## Item grouping

Related items are grouped together in the recipe viewer.

![REI grouping](https://refinedmods.com/rei-grouping.f46876b6.png)

## R/U key support

You can use the R and U keys on the [Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/grid.html) and filter slots to view recipes and usages respectively.

## Recipe viewer synchronization

You can sync the search box between REI and the [Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/grid.html):

- One-way (Grid → REI)  
- Two-way sync

![REI sync in the Grid](https://refinedmods.com/rei-sync.95dc999c.png)

## Ghost ingredient dragging

You can drag any type of ingredient from REI to filter slots in Refined Storage.

![REI ghost ingredient dragging](https://refinedmods.com/rei-ghost-dragging.1a059df6.png)

## Exclusion zones

REI elements automatically reposition to avoid overlapping Refined Storage GUI components.
